comments: Approved. The execution contract is tightly bounded to generating tasks/v0.7-m2-unified-model.md, and both the contract scope and recon packet consistently require that document to explicitly answer the six defining questions: artifact taxonomy, task lifecycle, reviewer vs. gatekeeper, acceptance vs. evaluation, personal vs. team mode core, and low cognitive load principles. The out_of_scope section is correctly restrictive: it forbids physical migrations to .agent-state/, modifications to src/ or MCP server capabilities/runtime logic, review or execution automation scripts, rewrites of active workflow semantics via dispatch.json/iteration-state.json, and environment adapter builds. Allowed files and stop conditions also reinforce that this phase is design-only and must not expand into implementation work.
